testimonials.name: Rahul Kumar
testimonials.text: Applied at 11 AM, money was in my account by 2 PM the same day. Absolutely seamless experience. No branch visits, no drama.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: I needed ₹80,000 for a medical emergency. Baid Stock Broking Services approved it in 10 minutes. Very helpful and transparent.

testimonials.name: Amit Mehta
testimonials.text: Tried 3 other apps — all rejected me. Baid Stock Broking understood my situation and approved ₹1 lakh instantly. Best for salaried people.

testimonials.name: Suresh Verma
testimonials.text: The paperless process is a game-changer. Everything was done digitally, and I didn't have to visit any office or submit physical documents.

testimonials.name: Neha Singh
testimonials.text: Very user-friendly process with great customer support. The interest rates are fair and the repayment process is simple and stress-free.

testimonials.name: Vikram Patel
testimonials.text: Got my salary loan approved within minutes. The whole process was smooth and completely online. Highly recommend Baid Stock Broking Services.

features.title: Instant Credit Decision
features.desc: Our automated underwriting engine delivers real-time credit decisions based on your income and repayment capacity.

features.title: Data Privacy & Security
features.desc: 256-bit SSL encryption with strict data privacy compliance. Your financial information is never shared with third parties under any circumstances.

features.title: Minimal Documentation
features.desc: Only Aadhaar, PAN & latest salary slip required. Our digital KYC pipeline verifies your identity in real time — no physical paperwork, no branch visits.

features.title: Transparent Fee Structure
features.desc: Full cost disclosure upfront — processing fee, APR, and total repayment shown before you sign. Zero hidden charges, zero prepayment penalty.

features.title: Income-Based Credit Limit
features.desc: Loan eligibility calculated on your net take-home salary. Choose repayment tenure of 7 to 40 days — structured around your salary disbursement cycle.

features.title: Borrower Support & Grievance
features.desc: Dedicated borrower support in Hindi & English. Adherence to RBI Fair Practices Code. Call +91-9355753533 for assistance or grievance resolution.

steps.title: Submit Loan Application
steps.desc: Complete a quick digital application with basic employment and income details — takes under 2 minutes.

steps.title: Complete Digital KYC
steps.desc: Upload your Aadhaar, PAN & salary slip for instant e-KYC verification. No physical documents needed.

steps.title: Credit Assessment
steps.desc: Our automated underwriting system evaluates your creditworthiness and income eligibility instantly.

steps.title: Funds Disbursed
steps.desc: Sanctioned loan amount transferred directly to your registered bank account via IMPS/NEFT — same day.

eligibility.title: Salaried Employee
eligibility.desc: Working in a private company, MNC, or government sector

eligibility.title: Age: 21 – 58 Years
eligibility.desc: Must be within working age at the time of application

eligibility.title: Minimum Salary ₹25,000/month
eligibility.desc: Net take-home salary credited to bank account

eligibility.title: Valid Aadhaar & PAN Card
eligibility.desc: Indian resident with valid KYC documents

eligibility.title: 3 Months Employment
eligibility.desc: At least 3 months in current job

faq.q: What is the minimum salary required to apply?
faq.a: You must have a minimum net take-home salary of ₹25,000 per month, credited to your bank account. Your income-based credit limit determines the loan amount you are eligible for.

faq.q: How quickly is the loan approved and disbursed?
faq.a: Our automated underwriting system delivers a credit decision quickly after application. Once approved, funds are transferred directly to your registered bank account via IMPS or NEFT — same business day.

faq.q: What documents are required for digital KYC?
faq.a: Only three documents are needed: Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, and your latest salary slip. All documents are uploaded digitally — no physical copies or branch visits required.

faq.q: Are there any prepayment charges or hidden fees?
faq.a: No prepayment penalties of any kind. We follow a full cost disclosure policy — the processing fee, APR, and total repayment amount are shown upfront before you accept any loan offer.

faq.q: What is the applicable interest rate and APR?
faq.a: We offer competitive, transparent APR based on your salary, loan amount, and chosen tenure. All applicable charges are disclosed upfront in compliance with RBI Fair Practices Code guidelines.

faq.q: Is my personal and financial data secure?
faq.a: Yes. We use 256-bit SSL encryption across all data transmissions. Your information is stored securely and is never sold or shared with any third party.
